message:
fix: preflight fail-open security bug, WS onerror stuck missions (#5848)

- Block mission on preflight exception instead of fail-open (#5846)
- Fail running missions to 'failed' state on WS onerror so UI doesn't
  stay stuck in "running" forever (#5845)

Fixes #5845 #5846

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
